'''Nomo Sliken''' was a [[Clawdite/Legends|Clawdite]] [[Assassin/Legends|assassin]] who worked for [[Moska]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] during the height of the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]]. It was he who murdered [[Nak Simm]], then took the [[Zabrak/Legends|Zabrak's]] place at a meeting that was scheduled to cement an alliance between the Hutt [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lords]] [[Torga]] and [[Jolla]]. Unfortunately, Nak Simm's body was discovered before the meeting could be finished, and Nomo Sliken's plans were exposed. Nomo fled from the [[Corusca Gem casino|Corusca Gem Casino]] in an effort to escape, using a variety of disguises to avoid being recognized. However, the beings with whom he had been meeting managed to capture him before he could escape into the crowded streets. Nomo was later imprisoned by Torga for his treachery.
